executive_summary: The Iran-US conflict remains at MAJOR intensity (742 incidents/24h) with day 4 seeing significant escalations: Israel struck Iran's Natanz nuclear facility twice, IRGC executed its 11th consecutive attack wave targeting 500+ US/Israeli sites, and Iranian strikes caused Gulf oil/gas production shutdowns. Civilian casualties are mounting (555+ confirmed by Iranian Red Crescent) including a major school incident in Minab. Qatar became the first Gulf state to directly shoot down Iranian bombers. The conflict is spreading geographically with Iranian attacks on Cyprus and threats to close the Strait of Hormuz.
whats_new: Israeli airstrikes struck Iran's Natanz nuclear facility twice — confirmed by Iranian Vice President
IRGC executed 11th wave of Operation True Promise 4, targeting 500+ American and Israeli military sites with 700 drones and hundreds of missiles
Qatar shot down two Iranian Su-24 bombers attempting to attack Gulf neighbors — first direct Gulf state interception of Iranian aircraft
Israeli Defense Forces announced strikes on 600+ Iranian regime targets including IRGC headquarters
Iranian drone struck hotel in Bahrain directly targeting US-aligned territory hosting NAVCENT
IRGC attacked and set fire to US-allied 'Aten Nova' tanker in Strait of Hormuz — vessel remains burning
Israeli jets evaded Iranian surface-to-air missiles during deep-penetration strikes on Tehran — IDF released footage
Iran hit Cyprus despite British neutrality, marking geographic expansion of Iranian retaliation
Pentagon reports Iran has no ships left in Gulf of Oman following US strikes
IRGC commander advisor threatened to burn any vessel passing through Strait of Hormuz
confirmed_events: Bahrain Defense Force intercepted 70 missiles and 59 drones in sustained Iranian attack campaign; Qatar shot down two Iranian bombers — both confirmed by multiple Gulf state sources
UAE air defenses intercepted nine ballistic missiles, six cruise missiles, and 148 drones in major combined attack
Israeli intelligence estimates over 1,000 IRGC members killed since conflict began — IRGC claims 1,000+ casualties confirmed
Iranian Red Crescent reports 555 civilians martyred across 131 cities in US-Israeli attacks
Israel conducted strikes deep inside Iranian territory using B-1 bombers targeting ballistic missile capabilities — US Central Command confirmed
unverified_emerging: Claim of 165 civilians including elementary school students killed in US-Israeli strike on Minab girls' school — IRGC/Red Crescent source, visual evidence emerging but unverified by independent sources
Israeli attack on Saudi Aramco refinery at Ras Tanura reported by Iranian Tasnim as 'false flag' — unconfirmed, Saudi Arabia has not confirmed incident
Israeli assessment claims 1,000-3,000 Iranian personnel killed (versus 1,000 figure from previous assessment) — unverified range
Iranian prediction markets allowing bets on whether Supreme Leader was killed — unverified market activity

people_travel: All US diplomatic personnel evacuated from Baghdad embassy — full departure confirmed
US 5th Fleet base in Bahrain under sustained drone/missile attack — personnel shelter-in-place protocols active
Airspace restrictions expanded over Gulf region — commercial flight diversions continuing
supply_chain: Gulf oil and gas production shut down due to Iranian strikes on energy infrastructure
Strait of Hormuz maritime traffic disrupted — Aten Nova tanker burning in chokepoint
Qatar Al Udeid airbase active but承受 significant Iranian drone/missile pressure
Saudi Aramco operations reportedly impacted if Ras Tanura attack confirmed
market_macro: Oil prices soaring amid Gulf production shutdowns and Strait of Hormuz threats
Inflation threat emerging — CNBC reports conflict threatens new price pressures undermining Trump admin economic narrative
US consumer sentiment likely impacted — Reuters/Ipsos poll shows only 27% approval of Iran strikes, 43% disapproval

outlook_24_72h.base_case: Conflict expected to continue at MAJOR intensity for at least 24-72h. Israel has announced doubling of targets attacked versus previous operation, indicating sustained offensive campaign. IRGC launching consecutive attack waves (11th confirmed, 12th imminent) demonstrates continued Iranian capacity for retaliation. Gulf states will remain primary target zone with Bahrain/UAE/Kuwait facing ongoing missile/drone barrages. Risk of civilian casualty incidents accumulating — UN examining school strike data.
escalation_risks: Strait of Hormuz closure threat — Iranian advisor explicitly threatened to burn any ship passing; Aten Nova attack demonstrates capability and intent
Nuclear facility escalation — Israel struck Natanz twice; further strikes on nuclear infrastructure could trigger Iran WMD response threshold
Expansion to Iraq — Iraqi FM warned country directly affected; US bases in Iraq targeted by Iranian strikes; Baghdad may be drawn into conflict
Cyprus/regional expansion — Iran demonstrated willingness to strike beyond Gulf; British assets now targeted
Hezbollah northern front — IDF reinforcing northern border; 52 Lebanese killed in single Israeli strike indicates widening southern Lebanon operations
outlook_24_72h.de_escalation_pathways: De-escalation pathways remain limited. US public opinion (43% disapproval) and UK caution (Starmer avoiding 'Iraq mistakes') create diplomatic pressure but no formal ceasefire proposals from either side. Russia and China mediating but statements suggest limited leverage. Iranian rhetoric explicitly threatens continued attacks until 'enemy defeated.' Qatar's direct interception of Iranian aircraft marks point of no return for Gulf state involvement. Congressional debate on war powers may constrain US escalation but not reverse current operations.
